testsuite.name: ru.netology.AuthTest

testcase.name: Should get error message if login with not registered user
Should get error message if login with blocked registered user

testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebDriverThreadLocalContainer - No webdriver is bound to current thread: 1 - let's create a new webdriver [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.FileHelper - Creating folder: C:\Users\mutov\Desktop\Netology\Java\Project\Patterns2\build\downloads\1776887094298_1580_1 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.SelenideNettyClientFactory - Changed readTimeout from PT3M to PT1M30S [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.SelenideNettyClientFactory - Changed readTimeout from PT3M to PT1M30S апр. 22, 2026 10:44:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 апр. 22, 2026 10:44:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.56. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.13.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - BrowserName=chrome Version=147.0.7727.56 Platform=windows [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenide v. 6.19.1 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenium WebDriver v. 4.13.0 build revision: ba948ece5b* [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.CreateDriverCommand - Created webdriver in thread 1: ChromeDriver -> ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (a301db513c3b829e1bb7c035c37725dc) [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Register WebDriverInstance[config=StaticConfig,webDriver=ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (a301db513c3b829e1bb7c035c37725dc),proxy=null,downloadsFolder=C:\Users\mutov\Desktop\Netology\Java\Project\Patterns2\build\downloads\1776887094298_1580_1] in 1 [size=1] [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Add shutdown hook in 1 [size=1]
